name: world-cup-intelligence
description: PitchIntel — FIFA World Cup 2026 tactical probability & news intelligence on Cloudflare

scripts.deploy:uat: npm run build && node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs deploy --config dist/wc_tactical_uat/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.db:migrate:local: node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs d1 migrations apply wc-tactical-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs d1 migrations apply wc-tactical-db --remote
scripts.db:migrate:uat: node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs d1 migrations apply wc-tactical-db-uat --remote
scripts.db:migrate:production: node scripts/wrangler-with-env.mjs d1 migrations apply wc-tactical-db --remote --env production
